'''pakodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbatharianism|sabbatharianism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbatharianism|sabbatharianism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pakodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pækedheth|pækedheth]] || [[word:pækedhej|pækedhej]] || [[word:pækedhesh|pækedhesh]] || [[word:pækedhe|pækedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pakokodhoth|pakokodhoth]] || [[word:pakokodhoj|pakokodhoj]] || [[word:pakokodhosh|pakokodhosh]] || [[word:pakokodho|pakokodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pakodhoth|pakodhoth]] || [[word:pakodhoj|pakodhoj]] || [[word:pakodhosh|pakodhosh]] || [[word:pakodho|pakodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pakofdhoth|pakofdhoth]] || [[word:pakofdhoj|pakofdhoj]] || [[word:pakofdhosh|pakofdhosh]] || [[word:pakofdhof|pakofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pakodhotho|pakodhotho]] || [[word:pakodhojo|pakodhojo]] || [[word:pakodhosho|pakodhosho]] || [[word:pakodhoko|pakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pakodhoth|pakodhoth]] || [[word:pakodhoj|pakodhoj]] || [[word:pakodhosh|pakodhosh]] || [[word:pakodho|pakodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pakodhothol|pakodhothol]] || [[word:pakodhojol|pakodhojol]] || [[word:pakodhoshol|pakodhoshol]] || [[word:pakodhokol|pakodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pakodhothotho|pakodhothotho]] || [[word:pakodhojojo|pakodhojojo]] || [[word:pakodhoshosho|pakodhoshosho]] || [[word:pakodhoko|pakodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pakodhothon|pakodhothon]] || [[word:pakodhojon|pakodhojon]] || [[word:pakodhoshon|pakodhoshon]] || [[word:pakodhokon|pakodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pakodhothoro|pakodhothoro]] || [[word:pakodhojoro|pakodhojoro]] || [[word:pakodhoshoro|pakodhoshoro]] || [[word:pakodhokoro|pakodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
